scanType: Focused scan: AI + Crypto / AI Agents in Prediction Markets
summary: 14 of 20 most profitable Polymarket wallets are bots. Prediction markets are becoming a 'bot playground.' Most bots exploit structural arbitrage (YES+NO < $1, cross-platform arb, logical mismatches) rather than superior predictions.

Polystrat (by Olas): AI agent on Polymarket since Feb 2026. 4,200+ trades in first month, up to 376% returns on individual trades. Self-custodied, runs 24/7. An automated bot generated $150K across 8,894 trades without human intervention.
DeFAI (DeFi + AI) is now a $22.8B token market. Added $10B in value in a single week this year. Virtual Protocol: 23,500+ active wallets, $479M in AI-driven economic activity.

Trust Wallet launched TWAK (Trust Wallet Agent Kit) on March 27: AI-powered trade execution across 25+ blockchains, non-custodial. EIP-7702 enables session keys for safe agent trading without exposing private keys. Walbi launched no-code AI trading agents (describe strategy in plain language).

Crypto trading platforms are racing to deploy AI agents, with job losses mounting. CZ (Changpeng Zhao) says AI agents will dominate crypto payments. The trajectory mirrors forex: human speculation -> machine-driven liquidity and price formation.

keyMetrics.botDominance: 14 of 20 most profitable Polymarket wallets are bots

workstreamTags.BUILD: CRITICAL: LEVER must be designed API-first for AI agent integration. 14/20 top Polymarket wallets are bots. If LEVER's leveraged positions are not easily accessible to AI agents, we miss the dominant user segment. EIP-7702 session keys should be supported. Consider: can an AI agent open, manage, and close leveraged positions programmatically?
workstreamTags.ADVISOR: The prediction market -> bot playground trajectory means LEVER's real users may be AI agents, not humans directly. Product strategy should account for this: API quality, programmatic position management, and agent-friendly documentation matter more than UI for power users.
workstreamTags.CEO: DeFAI is a $22.8B market. AI agents on prediction markets are the growth vector. LEVER as the leverage layer for AI agent trading is a powerful narrative for fundraising: 'AI agents need leverage to maximize capital efficiency on prediction markets, and LEVER is the only infrastructure that provides it.'
workstreamTags.IMPROVE: Walbi's no-code agent creation (plain language -> trading strategy) is a UX pattern worth studying. Could LEVER offer 'describe your thesis, we build the leveraged position' via AI?
